hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKING: Before writing to Figma, confirm: (1) Was reference-interpreter Design Brief confirmed? (2) Are you using search_design_system + importVariableByKeyAsync for ALL colors/text/spacing? (3) Will you run QA audit on returned IDs? If any answer is NO, stop and fix your approach.'
echo 'MANDATORY QA: Run the figma-style-binding QA verification script on ALL returned node IDs. Do NOT proceed to next step until all nodes PASS. Any raw {r,g,b} without variable binding = FAIL.'
